title: orthosiphon macrophyllus
intro: Orthosiphon macrophyllus, also known as misai duri, is a tropical plant native to Southeast Asia, commonly used in traditional medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of caffeic acid and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Orthosiphon macrophyllus include its ability to alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, improve kidney function, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy for treating kidney stones and other urinary disorders. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, capsules, and tinctures, and is often consumed in moderation to reap its medicinal benefits.
